title: gerbera delavayi var. henryi
intro: Gerbera delavayi var. henryi, also known as the Henry's gerbera, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Gerbera delavayi plant, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of Gerbera delavayi var. henryi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
